Senior Platform Engineer — Meridian Data Systems

About Us:
Meridian Data Systems is a Series C data infrastructure startup helping Fortune 500 companies build reliable, real-time data pipelines. Our platform processes over 10 billion events daily and is trusted by 200+ enterprises worldwide. We're looking for a Senior Platform Engineer to help scale our core infrastructure.

What You'll Do:
- Design, build, and maintain highly available distributed systems that power our data pipeline platform
- Own end-to-end service reliability for critical path systems processing billions of events
- Develop internal tooling and frameworks that improve developer productivity across the organization
- Drive architectural decisions for new platform capabilities in collaboration with product and engineering leadership
- Implement observability and monitoring solutions to ensure system health and performance
- Participate in on-call rotation and lead incident response and post-mortem processes
- Mentor engineers across the organization and contribute to our engineering culture

Requirements:
- 5+ years of professional software engineering experience with a focus on backend/infrastructure
- Strong proficiency in Python and Go
- Deep experience building and operating distributed systems at scale
- Expert knowledge of SQL databases (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL stores (Redis, DynamoDB, or similar)
- Hands-on experience with container orchestration (Kubernetes, Docker)
- Solid understanding of cloud platforms, preferably AWS
- Experience with message queuing and streaming systems (Kafka, Kinesis, or similar)
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to debug complex distributed system issues
- Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset

Nice to Have:
- Experience with infrastructure-as-code tools (Terraform, Pulumi, CloudFormation)
- Familiarity with service mesh technologies (Istio, Linkerd)
- Contributions to open source projects
- Experience with gRPC and protocol buffers
- Background in data engineering or analytics infrastructure

Benefits:
- Competitive salary ($180K-$240K) plus equity
- Remote-first with optional offices in SF, NYC, and Seattle
- Unlimited PTO, 16 weeks parental leave
- $5K annual learning and development budget
- Health, dental, and vision insurance
